description: An empty synthetic user config cannot establish the effective value because other configuration layers are not inspected.

findings.message: Cannot determine history persistence posture: history.persistence is unset in the user-level config; uninspected system, profile, trusted-project, or CLI layers may determine the effective value.
findings.unknown_reason: history.persistence is unset in the user-level config; uninspected system, profile, trusted-project, or CLI layers may determine the effective value.
